{"file_path":"/Users/aguy/.claude/plans/jolly-gathering-minsky.md","content":"# Plan: Append memory supersede note to README

## Context
Kody 0.4.1 ships with memory supersede/citation/confidence features. This live test verifies those features end-to-end by appending a second note to README.md, exercising the memory wiring. The prior verify-gate fix ensures verification runs at least to the ship stage.

## Action
Append one new line to `README.md` at the end of the existing "Autonomous Development with Kody" section (after line 83), or as a new note within that section, describing that this run tests supersede/citation/confidence.

**File to modify:**
- `/Users/aguy/projects/Kody-Engine-Tester/README.md`

## Verification
1. Read `README.md` to confirm the line was appended correctly
2. Run `git diff README.md` to show the change
"}
